_about: CCC Taxonomy of Programs (TOP) codes from the 7th Edition Manual (2023). Each 6-digit code carries its 2-digit category chapter + 4-digit subcategory + CTE designation (Career Technical Education). Asterisk-marked codes in the source manual are CTE-designated.
_source: California Community Colleges 2023 Taxonomy of Programs Manual, 7th Edition

0103.10.title: Agricultural Pest Control Advisor and Operator (Licensed)

0948.30.title: Motorcycle, Outboard, and Small Engine Repair

0952.60.title: Masonry, Tile, Cement, and Lath and Plaster

0956.70.title: Industrial and Occupational Safety and Health

0999.00.title: Other Engineering and Related Industrial Technologies

1117.00.title: Asian, South Asian, and Pacific Islands (Chinese and Japanese excluded)

1307.10.title: Restaurant and Food Services and Management

3020.00.title: Aviation and Airport Management and Services

4901.00.title: Liberal Arts and Sciences, General (Program Only)

4902.00.title: Biological and Physical Sciences (and Mathematics) (Program Only)
